diagrams.title: Euler's Formula Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows a planar graph with vertices, edges and labeled faces demonstrating v-e+r=2
diagrams.purpose: Understand relationship between vertices, edges and faces

diagrams.title: K5 Non-Planar Graph
diagrams.description: Complete graph with 5 vertices - shows why it cannot be drawn without edge crossings
elements: 5 vertices all connected to each other

diagrams.title: K3,3 Complete Bipartite Graph
diagrams.description: Three utilities (A,B,C) connected to three homes (1,2,3) - classic non-planar problem
elements: 9 edges connecting every utility to every home
No way to draw without crossings

diagrams.title: Maximal Planar Graph (Triangulated)
diagrams.description: A planar graph where all faces are triangles

diagrams.title: Graph Homeomorphism Example
diagrams.description: Shows how edge subdivision creates homeomorphic graphs
elements: After subdividing edges: new vertices of degree 2
